prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年江南大学在浙江省综合类最低录取位次分别为约21884名、30549名、27468名、37756名、27798名，整体波动较大；2022年因试卷难度变化位次大幅后移至30549名，2024年进一步后移至37756名创近年新低，2025年明显回升至27798名，近两年呈"V型"反弹走势，2025年基准位次约27798名；该校在浙江省综合类招生计划2021年332人、2022年332人、2023年338人、2024年337人、2025年326人，2026年计划337人，较2025年小幅扩招11人（+3.4%），扩招幅度有限，对竞争格局影响不大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 江南大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第65名持续上升至2025年第51名、2026年第52名，排名稳居全国前55强，学校综合实力和认可度稳步提升；2023年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学校管理相关事件，但影响范围有限；抖音热度排名第71位（综合热度383743），评价为"一般"，未出现明显报考热度信号；未见显著投档线断档记录；轻工技术与工程A+、食品科学与工程A+，均为全国顶尖水平；食品科学与工程、轻化工程、酿酒工程等对应招生专业具有学科优势，对相关方向考生有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，江南大学在上述领域亦有布局；浙江省2026年普通高考考生总数约40万人（较2025年29万人大幅增加约11万人），考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；省控线（平行录取一段）近年稳定在488–497分区间，2025年为490分，无明显波动；江南大学位于江苏无锡，属长三角核心区域，对浙江考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在浙江省招生规模较大（300人以上），属于跨省招生中计划较多的院校，本地考生报考意愿较高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次27798名、2026年计划小幅扩招（+3.4%）、浙江省考生总数大幅增加（+37.5%）、学校软科排名稳步提升等因素，扩招对位次有轻微下移作用（位次数字增大），但考生规模大幅增长带来的竞争加剧效应更为显著，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年有所后移；预测最低位次约28561名，区间28061–29061名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约28561名，区间28061–29061名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档为主力报考区间，一档专业可冲刺（需位次明显优于区间上限），三档专业作为保底选择。江南大学食品科学与工程（A+）和轻工技术与工程（A+）为全国顶尖学科，相关专业性价比高，适合对食品、轻化方向有兴趣的考生重点考虑。计算机、自动化、电气等工科专业热度高但竞争激烈，需结合自身位次合理定位。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Jiangnan University in Zhejiang Province comprehensive category were approximately 21884, 30549, 27468, 37756, and 27798 respectively, showing significant fluctuations overall; in 2022, due to changes in exam difficulty, the ranking dropped sharply to 30549, and in 2024 it further dropped to 37756, hitting a new low in recent years; in 2025, it rebounded significantly to 27798, showing a "V-shaped" recovery trend in the past two years, with a baseline ranking of approximately 27798 in 2025; the enrollment plan for Jiangnan University in Zhejiang Province comprehensive category was 332 in 2021, 332 in 2022, 338 in 2023, 337 in 2024, and 326 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 337, a slight increase of 11 students (+3.4%) compared to 2025, with limited expansion impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jiangnan University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science China University Ranking has risen continuously from 65th in 2021 to 51st in 2025 and 52nd in 2026, firmly ranking among the top 55 nationally, with steadily improving comprehensive strength and recognition; the reputation evaluation in 2023 was slightly negative, mainly related to school management incidents, but with limited impact; Douyin popularity ranking is 71st (comprehensive popularity 383743), rated as "average", with no obvious signal of application heat; no significant record of admission cutoff drops; Light Industry Technology and Engineering A+, Food Science and Engineering A+, both at the national top level; Food Science and Engineering, Light Chemical Engineering, Brewing Engineering and other corresponding enrollment majors have disciplinary advantages, attracting candidates interested in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended; Jiangnan University also has a presence in these fields; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Zhejiang Province in 2026 is about 400,000 (a significant increase of about 110,000 from 290,000 in 2025), with a notable expansion in candidate scale and intensified competition; the provincial control line (parallel admission first section) has been stable in the range of 488–497 points in recent years, with 490 points in 2025, showing no significant fluctuation; Jiangnan University is located in Wuxi, Jiangsu, in the core area of the Yangtze River Delta, with strong regional appeal to Zhejiang candidates; the university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Zhejiang Province (over 300 students), making it one of the institutions with more cross-provincial enrollment plans, and local candidates have a high willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 27798 in 2025, a slight expansion in the 2026 plan (+3.4%), a significant increase in the total number of candidates in Zhejiang Province (+37.5%), and the steady improvement in Jiangnan University's Soft Science ranking, the expansion has a slight downward effect on ranking (ranking number increases), but the intensified competition due to the large increase in candidate scale is more significant; it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be lower than in 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 28561, with a range of 28061–29061.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 28561, range 28061–29061. Candidates within the predicted range are advised to use Tier 2 as the main application range, Tier 1 majors can be attempted as reach (requires ranking significantly better than the upper limit of the range), and Tier 3 majors as safety choices. Jiangnan University's Food Science and Engineering (A+) and Light Industry Technology and Engineering (A+) are national top disciplines, with high cost-effectiveness for related majors, suitable for candidates interested in food and light chemical directions. Computer, Automation, Electrical Engineering and other engineering majors are popular but highly competitive, requiring candidates to position themselves reasonably based on their own rankings.
